_meta.purpose: English UI strings for the Locomate app. Keys are namespaced by route or shared component (e.g. `home.greeting.eyebrow`, `nav.tabs.home`). See messages/README.md for the brand-voice strings that intentionally remain Vietnamese in both locales.

brand.name: Locomate
brand.slogan: Go a place, know its grace.

greeting.slogan: Go a place, know its grace.

quizPrompt.title: Take the quiz to see your top matches
quizPrompt.subtitle: Answer once — we'll rank every Fixed Tour by your taste.

subtitle.v0: Phở's piping hot, alleys are calling — ready when you are?
subtitle.v1: Which hidden corner of Hà Nội is calling your name today?
subtitle.v2: The Old Quarter is calling your name, {name}.
subtitle.v3: Fixed tour or freestyle — either way, you're in for a treat.

search.placeholder: Search Hà Nội — phở, workshops, places…

fixed.title: Co-designed, ready to roll.
fixed.body: A standardised arc with a local guide along for the ride. From 480k — every penny well spent.

flexible.title: Build your day, hour by hour.
flexible.body: Tickets and workshops on one timeline. The logic handles clashes so you can go with the flow.

features.title: Six features, one heart.
features.body: Locomate is a standardised-with-flex travel platform. AI is the friend whispering hints — never the one behind the wheel.

aiMatch.title: Made for you, not the algorithm.
aiMatch.body: Not a black-box recommender. A plainspoken word in your ear — right pace, right taste, right tongue, right distance.

fixed.title: Co-designed, ready to roll.
fixed.body: A standardised arc: 1 attraction + 1–2 small workshops + 1 local meal. Same shape, different soul in every city.

flexible.title: Build your day, hour by hour.
flexible.body: Pick attractions and workshops on one shared timeline. Subway transfers and workshop reset windows are sorted before you blink.

guides.title: The right guide, the right vibe.
guides.body: More than an open calendar. We surface 1–2 guides who genuinely love what you've built — and tell you why before you pick. Birds of a feather, after all.

esim.title: Online the moment wheels touch down.
esim.body: Bundled into your itinerary. Switches on the second you land, scoped to your tour days. No kiosk scramble, no SIM-swap dance.

merch.title: Bring a slice of Hà Nội home.
merch.body: A short shelf of locally-designed pieces — áo, mũ, ceramic — discounted only for tour guests. Small souvenirs, big heart.

activities.title: Workshops & activities
activities.subtitle: Pick your tickets, paint your day.

hosts.title: Meet our local hosts
hosts.subtitle: Verified Hanoians — designing and telling each story themselves.

merch.title: Hanoi merch
merch.subtitle: Bundle with a tour — two birds, one ticket. Up to 25% off.

esim.title: Bundle an eSIM with any tour.
esim.subtitle: Live the second you land. 10% off at checkout — best of both worlds.

evening.title: Lanterns at first dark.

hosts.subtitle: Hanoians design it, Hanoians tell the story. No tickets, no queues — your table, your day.

hero.title: Connected the moment you land.
hero.subtitle: Pick a plan, scan a QR, walk out of the airport on Vietnamese 4G/5G. Bundle with any tour and save 10% in the bargain.

plans.title: Four sizes. One QR code.
plans.saveBadge: Save 10% when bundled with a tour.

toast.added: eSIM added to cart. Bundle with a tour to save 10%.

howItWorks.title: Three steps. Two minutes.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Pick the data plan that fits your trip length.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Delivered to your email instantly after purchase.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Open phone settings, scan the QR, you're online.

faq.title: Asked & answered.
faq.a1: An eSIM is a digital SIM that lets you activate a mobile data plan without a physical SIM card. Most phones made after 2018 support eSIM.
faq.a2: After purchase, you'll receive a QR code. Scan it in your phone's settings to activate your Vietnam data plan. Takes about 2 minutes.
faq.q3: Does it work on my phone?
faq.a3: eSIM works on iPhone XS and newer, Samsung Galaxy S20+, Google Pixel 3+ and most modern Android phones. Check gohub.com for the full compatibility list.
faq.a4: You can purchase anytime and activate when you land in Vietnam. The plan starts counting from the moment you activate.

esim.affiliateDisclosure: Powered by GoHub. Locomate may earn a commission from purchases made through these links.

step1.heading: The basics
step1.title: Title
step1.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Dawn at the Red River
step1.titleHelper: At least 8 characters. Shown as the listing headline.
step1.subtitle: Subtitle (optional)

step2.heading: Your story
step2.descriptionPlaceholder: Why should a traveler choose this tour? What happens, what makes it yours?
step2.highlightsHint: Add at least 1. Shown as bullet points on the detail page.

step3.heading: Schedule
step3.subtitle: Add at least one stop so travelers know what a typical booking looks like. Times are illustrative — you can adjust per booking.

step4.heading: Photos
step4.subtitle: At least 3 photos. Upload images from your device or paste an existing https URL. The first photo is the cover.

step5.heading: Pricing
step5.subtitle: Set the price a traveler sees. LOCOMATE keeps {pct}% to fund the platform; the rest goes to you.
step5.verifyHint: Complete your ID verification before publishing.

tonePicker.title: What voice should Locomate use with you?

toneSub.homHinh: Playful, a wink in every line

done.nicknameLabel: Locomate nên gọi bạn là gì? (có thể bỏ qua)

personality.heritage: You read the city through architecture, courtyards, and moss-covered walls. Locomate will lead with Thanh Tao Xứ Bắc for you.
personality.food: Taste is your gateway — Locomate will lead with Hương Men Nồng Say and back-alley kitchens on your journey.
personality.craft: You want to touch the craft, not just see it. Locomate will lead with Hồn Đất Nghệ Nhân for you.
personality.quiet: You need stillness. Locomate will pair you with quieter routes and unhurried guides.
personality.social: Doors are always open. Locomate will pair you with small groups, lively guides, and journeys that meet new people.
personality.balanced: You sit in balance — Locomate will keep your journey wide-banded, a different colour each day.

landing.body: Curated Hanoi tours with real guides, plus a-la-carte workshops, classes, and tickets. Mix what you want, skip what you don't.
